title: Dropdown
description: A dropdown lets users select a single value from a list of options. It combines a trigger button with a floating option list.
whenToUse: Single selection from a list of 5+ options. When you need to conserve vertical space compared to radio buttons. Form fields where the user picks from a predefined set.
whenNotToUse: For 2–4 options, use radio buttons instead so all options are visible. For text-entry with suggestions, use a combobox/autocomplete. For navigation, use nav or tabs.
_legacyAccessibilityNotes: Use role="combobox" on the trigger and role="listbox" on the list. aria-expanded announces open/closed state.
